Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CustomerIdentificationResult

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CustomerIdentificationResult
public class CustomerIdentificationResult extends Object
CustomerIdentificationResult

Result from a customer identification check

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    CustomerIdentificationResult.Builder
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CustomerIdentificationResult()
     
    CustomerIdentificationResult(Optional<? extends BirthDateVerified> birthDateVerified, Optional<Boolean> completed, Optional<? extends DocumentAuthenticityVerified> documentAuthenticityVerified, Optional<? extends DocumentExpiryStatus> documentExpiryStatus, Optional<? extends List<String>> documentVerificationIds, Optional<String> documentarySessionUri, Optional<? extends EmailVerified> emailVerified, Optional<Boolean> expired, Optional<String> externalVendor, Optional<String> externalVendorId, Optional<? extends IdentificationNumberVerified> identificationNumberVerified, Optional<? extends List<IdentityVerificationTypes>> identityVerificationTypes, Optional<? extends LegalAddressVerified> legalAddressVerified, Optional<? extends NameVerified> nameVerified, Optional<? extends PhoneNumberVerified> phoneNumberVerified, Optional<String> rawVendorResult, Optional<? extends SelfieVerified> selfieVerified)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<BirthDateVerified>
    birthDateVerified()
    Whether or not the customer birth date was verified
    static CustomerIdentificationResult.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<Boolean>
    completed()
    Whether or not the result is completed Must be true to be linked to an Investigation or used to Create/Update an LegalNaturalPerson
    Optional<String>
    documentarySessionUri()
    The URI to complete documentary session Will be populated if the CheckType is DOCUMENTARY
    Optional<DocumentAuthenticityVerified>
    documentAuthenticityVerified()
    Whether or not the document authenticity is verified or not Will be NOT_IN_SCOPE if the check being done is not documentary
    Optional<DocumentExpiryStatus>
    documentExpiryStatus()
    Whether or not the document expiry was verified This is only in scope for document verification checks If document is expired this will be set to EXPIRED
    Optional<List<String>>
    documentVerificationIds()
    One or more ULIDs from the documents api of the image(s) of the document that relates to the identification check for a DOCUMENTARY check, these will be the images provided in the session
    Optional<EmailVerified>
    emailVerified()
    Whether or not the customer email was verified
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    Optional<Boolean>
    expired()
    Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed
    Optional<String>
    externalVendor()
    The name of the external vendor
    Optional<String>
    externalVendorId()
    The id relating to the external vendor
    int
    hashCode()
     
    Optional<IdentificationNumberVerified>
    identificationNumberVerified()
    Whether or not the customer identification number was verified
    Optional<List<IdentityVerificationTypes>>
    identityVerificationTypes()
    Describes the type(s) of Identity Verification that was performed
    Optional<LegalAddressVerified>
    legalAddressVerified()
    Whether or not the customer legal address was verified
    Optional<NameVerified>
    nameVerified()
    Presents verified results e.g.
    Optional<PhoneNumberVerified>
    phoneNumberVerified()
    Whether or not the customer phone number was verified
    Optional<String>
    rawVendorResult()
    Raw vendor result will return full json response from vendor if view is set to FULL
    Optional<SelfieVerified>
    selfieVerified()
    Whether or not the customer photo identification was verified Will be NOT_IN_SCOPE if the check being done is not selfie
    String
    toString()

    CustomerIdentificationResult
    withExpired(boolean expired)
    Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed
    CustomerIdentificationResult
    withExpired(Optional<Boolean> expired)
    Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomerIdentificationResult

      public CustomerIdentificationResult(Optional<? extends BirthDateVerified> birthDateVerified, Optional<Boolean> completed, Optional<? extends DocumentAuthenticityVerified> documentAuthenticityVerified, Optional<? extends DocumentExpiryStatus> documentExpiryStatus, Optional<? extends List<String>> documentVerificationIds, Optional<String> documentarySessionUri, Optional<? extends EmailVerified> emailVerified, Optional<Boolean> expired, Optional<String> externalVendor, Optional<String> externalVendorId, Optional<? extends IdentificationNumberVerified> identificationNumberVerified, Optional<? extends List<IdentityVerificationTypes>> identityVerificationTypes, Optional<? extends LegalAddressVerified> legalAddressVerified, Optional<? extends NameVerified> nameVerified, Optional<? extends PhoneNumberVerified> phoneNumberVerified, Optional<String> rawVendorResult, Optional<? extends SelfieVerified> selfieVerified)

  • Method Details

    • birthDateVerified

      public Optional<BirthDateVerified> birthDateVerified()
      Whether or not the customer birth date was verified

    • completed

      public Optional<Boolean> completed()
      Whether or not the result is completed Must be true to be linked to an Investigation or used to Create/Update an LegalNaturalPerson

    • documentAuthenticityVerified

      public Optional<DocumentAuthenticityVerified> documentAuthenticityVerified()
      Whether or not the document authenticity is verified or not Will be NOT_IN_SCOPE if the check being done is not documentary

    • documentExpiryStatus

      public Optional<DocumentExpiryStatus> documentExpiryStatus()
      Whether or not the document expiry was verified This is only in scope for document verification checks If document is expired this will be set to EXPIRED

    • documentVerificationIds

      public Optional<List<String>> documentVerificationIds()
      One or more ULIDs from the documents api of the image(s) of the document that relates to the identification check for a DOCUMENTARY check, these will be the images provided in the session

    • documentarySessionUri

      public Optional<String> documentarySessionUri()
      The URI to complete documentary session Will be populated if the CheckType is DOCUMENTARY

    • emailVerified

      public Optional<EmailVerified> emailVerified()
      Whether or not the customer email was verified

    • expired

      public Optional<Boolean> expired()
      Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed

    • externalVendor

      public Optional<String> externalVendor()
      The name of the external vendor

    • externalVendorId

      public Optional<String> externalVendorId()
      The id relating to the external vendor

    • identificationNumberVerified

      public Optional<IdentificationNumberVerified> identificationNumberVerified()
      Whether or not the customer identification number was verified

    • identityVerificationTypes

      public Optional<List<IdentityVerificationTypes>> identityVerificationTypes()
      Describes the type(s) of Identity Verification that was performed

    • legalAddressVerified

      public Optional<LegalAddressVerified> legalAddressVerified()
      Whether or not the customer legal address was verified

    • nameVerified

      public Optional<NameVerified> nameVerified()
      Presents verified results e.g. if name or birth date have been verified

    • phoneNumberVerified

      public Optional<PhoneNumberVerified> phoneNumberVerified()
      Whether or not the customer phone number was verified

    • rawVendorResult

      public Optional<String> rawVendorResult()
      Raw vendor result will return full json response from vendor if view is set to FULL

    • selfieVerified

      public Optional<SelfieVerified> selfieVerified()
      Whether or not the customer photo identification was verified Will be NOT_IN_SCOPE if the check being done is not selfie

      public static CustomerIdentificationResult.Builder builder()

      Whether or not the result is completed Must be true to be linked to an Investigation or used to Create/Update an LegalNaturalPerson

      Whether or not the document expiry was verified This is only in scope for document verification checks If document is expired this will be set to EXPIRED

      One or more ULIDs from the documents api of the image(s) of the document that relates to the identification check for a DOCUMENTARY check, these will be the images provided in the session

      One or more ULIDs from the documents api of the image(s) of the document that relates to the identification check for a DOCUMENTARY check, these will be the images provided in the session

      The URI to complete documentary session Will be populated if the CheckType is DOCUMENTARY

    • withEmailVerified

      public CustomerIdentificationResult withEmailVerified(EmailVerified emailVerified)
      Whether or not the customer email was verified

    • withEmailVerified

      public CustomerIdentificationResult withEmailVerified(Optional<? extends EmailVerified> emailVerified)
      Whether or not the customer email was verified

    • withExpired

      public CustomerIdentificationResult withExpired(boolean expired)
      Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed

    • withExpired

      public CustomerIdentificationResult withExpired(Optional<Boolean> expired)
      Whether or not the result is expired An expired result will cause all `VerificationState`'s to be `UNVERIFIED`, the `ExpirationState` will be `EXPIRED` Will always be `false` for synchronous checks such as `DATABASE` Will be `true` when an asynchronous check such as `DOCUMENTARY` hasn't been completed within the timeframe If `true` the `completed` field will be `false` since a check was never completed
